## Proposed Changes
Please provide a detailed description of the changes you are introducing:
- What components are added or modified?
- What issue does this PR resolve? (E.g., Closes #12)

## Type of Change
Check the options that apply to this PR:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Visual Proof (For UI/UX changes)
Please paste screenshots or GIFs demonstrating the new interface or changes on mobile and desktop viewports:
- **Desktop:** [Insert Image]
- **Mobile:** [Insert Image]

## Checklist
By submitting this PR, I confirm that:
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved any lints.
- [ ] I have verified that the production build completes successfully via `npm run build`.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any new security vulnerabilities.
